name: stackos-desktop
description: macOS desktop shell for the local StackOS daemon and UI.
author: StackOS contributors

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/service.js && node --check src/updates.js && node --check src/deep-links.js && node --check src/notifications.js && node --check src/menu-template.js && node --check scripts/build-icons.mjs && node --check scripts/build-mac.mjs && node --check scripts/release-artifacts.cjs && node --check scripts/refresh-notarized-update-metadata.cjs && node --check scripts/sign-stackos-runtime-mac.cjs && node --check scripts/release-preflight.mjs && node scripts/doctor.mjs && node scripts/test-service-readiness.cjs && node scripts/test-service-upgrade.cjs && node scripts/test-notifications.cjs && node scripts/test-updates.cjs && node scripts/test-build-mac-config.cjs && node scripts/test-release-metadata-refresh.cjs && node scripts/test-latest-dmg-alias.cjs && node scripts/test-menu.cjs
scripts.dist:mac:dev: STACKOS_UNSIGNED_DEV=1 STACKOS_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_RELEASE=1 STACKOS_SKIP_NOTARIZATION=1 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false node scripts/build-mac.mjs
